tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const t=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/tasks/active/M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001.json','utf8')); const c=t.contract||{}; const r='target,scenario_person_event_scope,required_review_states,post_lock_policy,balance_tuning_window,roadmap_acceptance_mapping,evidence_requirements,boundaries,vertical_slice_acceptance'.split(','); const text=JSON.stringify(c)+' '+JSON.stringify(t.acceptance_evidence||{}); const ok=r.every(k=>c[k]) && /Human Gate/.test(text) && /PASS_WITH_LIMITS/.test(text) && /DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE/.test(text) && /post-1\.0 non-blocking candidate/.test(text) && Array.isArray(c.roadmap_acceptance_mapping) && c.roadmap_acceptance_mapping.length>=11; if(!ok) process.exit(1); console.log('shape ok: required contract sections, M7 evidence mapping, future Human Gate, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE present');"
tests_run.result: shape ok: required contract sections, M7 evidence mapping, future Human Gate, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE present

tests_run.command: node -e "const cp=require('child_process'); const files=cp.execSync('git diff --name-only cf25e7e47f25ab96b9a152f3a14bec3e8444d43b..HEAD',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean); const allowed=[/^PROJECT_STATUS\.md$/, /^project\/tasks\/active\/M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001\.json$/, /^project\/tasks\/thread-registry\.json$/, /^project\/messages\//, /^project\/goal-mode-state\.json$/, /^project\/model-routing-state\.json$/]; const forbidden=[/^apps\//,/^packages\//,/^content-source\//,/^tools\//,/^\.github\//,/^docs\/decisions\//,/^docs\/GATE-M[0-6]\.md$/,/^docs\/11-roadmap\.md$/,/^docs\/13-risk-register-and-test-strategy\.md$/,/^docs\/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix\.md$/,/^docs\/27-autonomous-goal-mode\.md$/,/^MANIFEST\.md$/,/^SHA256SUMS\.txt$/,/^VALIDATION_REPORT\.md$/]; const outside=files.filter((f)=>!allowed.some((r)=>r.test(f))); const blocked=files.filter((f)=>forbidden.some((r)=>r.test(f))); if(outside.length||blocked.length){ console.error(JSON.stringify({outside,blocked,files},null,2)); process.exit(1); } console.log('path scope ok: '+files.length+' changed files, all allowed, no forbidden paths');"
tests_run.result: path scope ok: 9 changed files, all allowed, no forbidden paths

decisions: ACCEPT: M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 satisfies the requested planning-only content-lock contract review scope.
Formal content lock acceptance remains a future Human Gate in M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001; this review does not approve content lock.
M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and is carried forward with Alpha scaffolding, local adviser evidence, batch tuning risk, and unsigned desktop smoke limits.
DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is preserved exactly as a post-1.0 non-blocking candidate unless a later Human Gate reverses it.

No product code, package code, content-source data, platform behavior, release artifact, roadmap, acceptance matrix, prior gate, ADR, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, arbitrary-code mod support, or manual node battle work is approved by this review.
risks: Actual reviewed HEAD is e8e2f3a3c10625d9d1e4bf30fef6a907579c7be3, ahead of the route message CURRENT_ROUTE_COMMIT 44d4c418 by process-only commits; base..HEAD path guard still passed.
Downstream M7 content, culture, balance, platform, save, and manual playthrough tasks remain R4-sensitive and require their assigned reviewers.
Post-lock tuning remains limited to explicit defect or evidence-backed tuning records; content expansion remains outside this task.
requested_action: Lead integration review. Do not treat this ACCEPT as formal content lock approval, M7 Gate approval, M8 release readiness, or authorization for product/content/code/platform/release changes.
